overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic waterfront city during golden hour. The journey transitions from an open plaza across water via boat/dock, through a neon-lit commercial district with large digital billboards, and back to the waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with reflective metal tiling

events.description: begins descending toward water edge from plaza

agents.ego_description: walking across open plaza toward waterfront at sunset

entered.detail: reflective metal tile flooring with geometric patterns
row of palm trees silhouetted against golden sunset
futuristic city skyline with setting sun
calm water reflecting orange sunset light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide waterfront plaza with reflective metal tiles. Palm trees line the horizon against a golden sunset sky. The camera moves steadily forward toward the water's edge where a dock or boat awaits.

scene_state.functional_zone: boat deck or dock walkway along water canal

events.description: steps onto boat or dock structure from plaza
slight left turn while moving along waterway

agents.ego_description: traveling along the water on a boat or dock platform, passing modern architecture

entered.detail: metal and wood safety railing along water edge
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows
calm water surface with sunset reflections

segments.scene_description: Moving along a waterfront transit path with railings visible in the foreground. The water reflects the golden sunset to the left while modern glass towers rise on the right. The journey continues along the canal toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock landing area with transition to urban environment

events.description: arrives at dock and disembarks from boat
character falls to ground or body visible on dock platform

agents.ego_description: stepping off boat onto dock platform, then recovering from fall

notable_agents.action: character lying prone on ground near dock edge

entered.detail: concrete dock area with metal fixtures and equipment
building facade with glowing signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the dock platform and disembarking. The camera shows a character lying on the concrete ground near the water's edge. The environment transitions to an urban setting with neon-lit buildings rising ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards and neon signage

events.description: enters shadow of buildings with dominant neon artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through busy commercial district with bright neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along sidewalk in various directions

entered.detail: large purple neon billboard with prominent text
red and blue advertisement with lightning bolt graphic
tall building covered in digital displays and glowing windows
tall wall with horizontal red accent lines

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense urban canyon filled with bright neon billboards including a prominent 'WET DREAM' sign and CHOOH2 advertisements. The lighting shifts to artificial neon as natural sunlight is blocked by tall buildings. Pedestrians move along the concrete sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with marina and modern architecture

events.description: exits commercial district back to open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront promenade with sunset view and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera along waterfront

entered.detail: open walkway with view of water and sunset
low-rise modern structure with horizontal architectural lines

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the neon district back to the open waterfront promenade. The sunset is visible again over the water, with docked boats in the marina to the left and modern architecture to the right. The scene returns to natural golden hour lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a serene, sun-drenched waterfront plaza into a dense neon urban canyon before returning to the open coast. It begins by moving across reflective metal tiles toward the water's edge, where the camera glides along a transit path flanked by glass towers and a golden sunset. As the camera disembarks at a concrete dock, the natural light fades and the environment shifts into a crowded city center dominated by towering artificial billboards and glowing advertisements for CHOOH2 and Wet Dream. The scene then pushes through this neon-lit corridor of pedestrians and concrete before finally emerging from the urban shadows back onto the waterfront promenade. The lighting returns to a warm golden hour glow as the camera reveals a marina of docked boats and modern architecture under the fading sun.
